pi_items.source: Verified against the task description and verifier.py VLM prompt, which both explicitly mandate this path.
Verified against the task description and verifier.py VLM prompt, which both mandate a 'Daily' frequency.
Verified against the task description and verifier.py VLM prompt, which both mandate the '02:00' backup time.
Verified against the task description and verifier.py VLM prompt, which both mandate setting retention to '30'.
Verified via environment setup logs and evaluation scripts (export_result.sh, setup_task.sh) which hardcode this as the ADAudit Plus installation configuration path.
Verified via export_result.sh and setup_task.sh, which programmatically clean up and assert the existence of this target directory (/cygdrive/c/ADAuditBackups).

privileged_info_summary: The correct target backup configuration states a 'Daily' backup at '02:00', retaining '30' backups, stored in 'C:\ADAuditBackups'. The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus installation and configuration path is 'C:\Program Files\ManageEngine\ADAudit Plus\conf', which is monitored by the evaluation scripts to verify changes.
